control_awareness: The amount triggers department_head level approval (P2P-C-001), requester cannot approve own requests (P2P-C-002), and pre-PO approval is required (P2P-C-003).
expected_control_effect: The system will enforce that the request is routed to the department head for approval before PO issuance.
overall_reason: Since the purchase need amount is above 1,000,000, department head approval is required. There is no quarter-end pressure or urgency to split requests, so creating one consolidated purchase request with normal route type is operationally reasonable, complies with controls, and follows the requester objectives to obtain needed services via the standard process.
reason: The total amount of 1,750,000 exceeds the 1,000,000 threshold requiring department_head approval, so a single consolidated purchase request is appropriate and aligns with the preference for a straightforward, auditable plan with no quarter-end pressure.
